---
title: "05_Module_Scoring_Selection (fixed)"
author: "automated-patch"
date: "2026-03-04"
output: pdf_document
---

# Setup and Configuration

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(here)
base_dir <- here::here("Proteomics")
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = base_dir)

# Ensure results directory exists
results_dir <- file.path(base_dir, "results", "network_annotation")
dir.create(results_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

# Load Libraries

```{r libs, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
pkgs <- c("dplyr", "tibble", "here", "readr")
# Check for missing packages and install them
missing_pkgs <- pkgs[!(pkgs %in% installed.packages()[,"Package"])]
if(length(missing_pkgs) > 0){
  message("Installing missing packages: ", paste(missing_pkgs, collapse=", "))
  install.packages(missing_pkgs, dependencies = TRUE, repos = "https://cloud.r-project.org")
}

# Now, load all packages
for(pk in pkgs){
  if(!pk %in% .packages()){
    library(pk, character.only = TRUE)
  }
}
options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
```

# Load WGCNA Data

```{r load-data}
# Load key results from WGCNA step
wgcna_file <- file.path(base_dir, "results", "wgcna", "WGCNA2_core_outputs.RData")
if (!file.exists(wgcna_file)) stop("WGCNA output file not found: ", wgcna_file)

load(wgcna_file)

# Check that necessary objects are loaded
if (!exists("moduleTraitCor") || !exists("moduleTraitP")) {
  stop("Required objects 'moduleTraitCor' or 'moduleTraitP' not found in RData file.")
}

cor_mat <- moduleTraitCor
pval_mat <- moduleTraitP
```

# Define Trait Groups and Parameters

```{r define-trait-groups}
# Biologically motivated trait groups
vascular_traits <- c("PC1", "fsrp", "htnscore", "SBP", "d_cmb", "lacunar_stroke")
caa_traits <- c("caa_prob", "caa")
ad_traits <- c("AD_status", "E4status", "cog_status")

# Verify that all specified traits exist in the correlation matrix
all_defined_traits <- unique(c(vascular_traits, caa_traits, ad_traits))
missing_traits <- setdiff(all_defined_traits, colnames(cor_mat))
if (length(missing_traits) > 0) {
  stop("The following traits are defined but not found in the data: ", paste(missing_traits, collapse = ", "))
}

# Thresholds for discrete scoring
r_thresh <- 0.12
q_thresh <- 0.05
```

# Calculate FDR-Corrected P-values

```{r fdr-correction}
# Create a matrix to hold FDR-corrected p-values (q-values)
qval_mat <- pval_mat
for (trait in colnames(pval_mat)) {
  qval_mat[, trait] <- p.adjust(pval_mat[, trait], method = "BH")
}
```

# Method 1: Discrete Scoring (Hit Counting)

```{r discrete-scoring}
score_discrete <- function(trait_set, direction = c("two_sided", "positive", "negative")) {
  direction <- match.arg(direction)
  sapply(rownames(cor_mat), function(mod) {
    r_vec <- as.numeric(cor_mat[mod, trait_set])
    q_vec <- as.numeric(qval_mat[mod, trait_set])
    
    if (direction == "two_sided") {
      sum(abs(r_vec) >= r_thresh & q_vec < q_thresh, na.rm = TRUE)
    } else if (direction == "positive") {
      sum(r_vec >= r_thresh & q_vec < q_thresh, na.rm = TRUE)
    } else {
      sum(r_vec <= -r_thresh & q_vec < q_thresh, na.rm = TRUE)
    }
  })
}

module_scores_discrete <- data.frame(
  module = rownames(cor_mat),
  vascular_hits = score_discrete(vascular_traits, direction = "positive"),
  caa_hits = score_discrete(caa_traits, direction = "positive"),
  ad_hits_pos = score_discrete(ad_traits, direction = "positive"),
  ad_hits_neg = score_discrete(ad_traits, direction = "negative")
)

# Assign labels based on hit counts
module_scores_discrete$label_discrete <- "none"
module_scores_discrete$label_discrete[module_scores_discrete$vascular_hits >= 2] <- "vascular"
module_scores_discrete$label_discrete[module_scores_discrete$caa_hits >= 1] <- "CAA"
module_scores_discrete$label_discrete[module_scores_discrete$ad_hits_neg >= 1] <- "protective_healthy"
```

# Method 2: Continuous Scoring (Magnitude-based)

```{r continuous-scoring}
score_continuous <- function(trait_set) {
  sapply(rownames(cor_mat), function(mod) {
    r_vec <- as.numeric(cor_mat[mod, trait_set])
    q_vec <- as.numeric(qval_mat[mod, trait_set])
    # Sum the absolute correlation values for only the significant traits
    sum(abs(r_vec[q_vec < q_thresh]), na.rm = TRUE)
  })
}

module_scores_continuous <- data.frame(
  module = rownames(cor_mat),
  vascular_score = score_continuous(vascular_traits),
  caa_score = score_continuous(caa_traits),
  ad_score = score_continuous(ad_traits)
)

# Standardize scores (z-scores) for comparison
module_scores_continuous <- module_scores_continuous %>%
  mutate(
    vascular_z = scale(vascular_score)[, 1],
    caa_z = scale(caa_score)[, 1],
    ad_z = scale(ad_score)[, 1]
  )

# Assign a label based on the domain with the highest absolute z-score
module_scores_continuous$label_continuous <- apply(
  module_scores_continuous[, c("vascular_z", "caa_z", "ad_z")],
  1,
  function(x) {
    if (all(x == 0)) return("none")
    domains <- c("vascular", "CAA", "AD")
    domains[which.max(abs(x))]
  }
)
```

# Combine and Save Results

```{r save-results}
# Join the results from both scoring methods into a single table
final_comparison_table <- module_scores_discrete %>%
  left_join(module_scores_continuous, by = "module")

print("Combined Module Scoring Results:")
print(final_comparison_table)

# Save the final table to a CSV file
output_file <- file.path(results_dir, "Module_Trait_Scoring_Combined.csv")
write_csv(final_comparison_table, output_file)

message("Module scoring table saved to: ", output_file)
```
